content: Remember that the purpose of the Tatoeba Project is to create example sentences that can be used for studying languages. It's not really a place to be contributing non-native language sentences for others to correct for you.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by CK (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: TRANSLATION
ita:Ricorda che lo scopo del Progetto Tatoeba è di creare frasi di esempio che possono essere usate per studiare le lingue
